sections.sectionTitle: Solomon Tungah Topa A Nihveina Kilang

verses.text: Solomon in Topa' biakinn leh kumpi inn leh a lamnop khempeuh a lam a man khit ciangin
Gibeon-a ama tungah a kilahsa bangin Solomon tungah Topa a nihveina kilang hi

Topa in ama kiangah, “Keima mai-ah na hihsa na thungetna leh na thumnate ka za khin hi. Na lamsa hih biakinn ka ap khin hi. A tawntungin tua biakinn sungah kei hong kibia ding a, a tawntungin tua biakinn ka hu ding hi
Nang ahih leh, na pa David a gamtat bangin lungsim thupina leh thumanna tawh ka mai-ah gamta-in, nang kong thupiak khempeuh bangin sem a, ka thukhamte leh ka ngeina kipte na zuih leh
na pa David tungah, ‘Israel kumpi tokhom tungah mi khat zong na tasam kei ding hi,’ ci-in ka ciamsa bangin Israel-te tungah na kumpi tokhom ka kipsak paisuak ding hi

Ahih hangin nang na hi a, na tate ahi zongin, keimah zuihna panin pialin, note mai-ah ka koih ka thupiaknate leh ka thukhamte na zuih kei uh a, pasian dangte' na a sem ding leh a bia dingin na pai uh leh

amaute ka piaksa leitang panin Israel mite ka lakhia ding hi. Tua ciangin ka min dingin ka apsa biakinn pen ka muhna panin ka lawnkhia ding a, Israel-te pen mi khempeuh lakah paunak leh thugentehna suak ding hi

Tua ciangin hih biakinn pen ninbulomtang suak ding a, a nawkkha mi khempeuh in lamdangsa-in, eh! ci ding uh hi. Amaute in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih leitang leh hih biakinn hih bangin hih ahi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, ‘Egypt panin a pu a pate uh a paikhiatpih Topa a Pasian uh amaute in nusia-in pasian dangte len uh a, tuate bia-in a na a sepna hang uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih siatna khempeuh amaute tungah tungsak hi,’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Solomon in inn nihte, Topa' biakinn leh kumpi inn a lam kum sawmnih a beina
Taia kumpi Hiram in Solomon' deih zahzah taamtak sing leh taaksan sing leh kham a piak khit ciangin, Kumpi Solomon in Galilee gamsunga om khuapi sawmnih, Hiram tungah a pia hi
Ahih hangin Solomon in amah a piaksa khuapite a en dingin Taia panin Hiram hong pai ciangin, tua khuapite tawh amah lungkim zolo hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Ka sanggam aw, kei nong piak hih khuapite a bangci khuapi ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin tuate Kabul gam kici hi
Hiram in kumpipa kiangah a piak kham talen za khat leh talen sawmnih a pha hi
Topa' biakinn, ama inn, Jerusalem kulh, leh Hazor, Megiddo, leh Gezer khuate a lam dingin Kumpi Solomon in aana tawh na a semte a la hi
(Egypt kumpi Faro paito a, Gezer la-in mei tawh hal a, a khuapi sunga teng Kanaan mite thatin Solomon' zi, a tanu' tungah moken'in a khuapi a piak ahi hi
Tua ahih manin Solomon in Gezer khua lamkik hi). Tua banah Bethhoron nuainung
leh Baalath leh Judah gamsung gamlakah Tamar

leh Solomon in a neih vankoihna khuapi khempeuh, leh a leengte-a' ding khuapite, leh a sakol tung tuangte-a' ding khuapite, leh Jerusalem sung, Lebanon sung, leh ama ukna gamsung khempeuhah zong Solomon in a lamnop khempeuh a lamkik hi
Israel mi a hilo Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, leh Jebus mite sung panin a omlai mi khempeuh
Israel mite in a suksiat khit siang zawhloh, tua gamah amau' nunga a omlai a suanlekhakte uh, Solomon in aana tawh na a sem salin bawl ahih ciangin tuni dongin tua bangmahin amaute om uh hi
Ahih hangin Solomon in Israel mite salin bawllo hi. Amaute pen galkapte, ama nuai-ah a uliante, a galkapmangte, a leeng ukte, leh a sakol tung tuangte ahi uh hi
Solomon' innlam nasep a uk ulianpite mi za nga leh sawmnga ahi hi
Faro tanu-a' dingin Solomon in a lamsak ama inn-ah a om dingin David khuapi panin amah a paikhiat khit ciangin Solomon in Millo a lam hi
Solomon in Topa-a' dingin a lam biakna tau tungah meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna kum khatin thumvei pia-in Topa' mai-ah paknamtui a hal hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a biakinn a zo hi
Kumpi Solomon in Edom gamsung San Tuipi gei dunga om Eloth nai-a Eziongeber-ah teembaw honkhat a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Hiram in tua teembaw honte tawh tuipi tung nasep a thei tuipi mi a nasemte, Solomon' nasemte tawh sawlkhia hi
Tua ciangin amaute Ofir-ah pai-in tua lai panin kham talen za li leh sawmnih hong pua uh a, amaute in Kumpi Solomon kiangah tuate tun'pih uh hi.
